name: Carrot Cake Two-Bite Balls

ingredients.item: plus 2 tablespoons unsweetened shredded coconut, divided

method: Add the oats, almond meal, pecans, ⅓ cup coconut, carrots, dates, and cocoa powder to a food processor. Mix on high until well processed. You may have to scrape down the edges a couple of times to make sure the dates aren’t clumping. Add the almond butter, cinnamon, nutmeg, and ginger. Mix again until well mixed. Scrape down again if needed.

Transfer to a flat surface and make sure all is blended well. Use your hands if necessary. Pinch off pieces of dough and roll into sixteen balls. Roll the balls in additional shredded coconut, if desired.
